Plan: 1 to modify.

Summary by type:
  tables: 1 to modify

Tables:
  ~ pgschema_repro_nulls
    + pgschema_repro_nulls_uniq (constraint)

DDL to be executed:
--------------------------------------------------

ALTER TABLE pgschema_repro_nulls
ADD CONSTRAINT pgschema_repro_nulls_uniq UNIQUE NULLS NOT DISTINCT (a, b);
